title: The White Line
writer: Clare Catalano, Piero Tellini, Stefano Terra

plot: Following World War II, the Allies designate that an unidentified town in the Trieste area as being partly Yugoslavian and partly Italian. A white line of demarcation splits the town in half and the townspeople are given just a sh...
